task: A transient outage of the metrics backend currently crashes the request handler mid-request. Make MetricsBuffer.flush() resilient so an unavailable backend does not take down request handling.
correctness_argument: The specific ConnectionError is caught rather than the broad Exception, so programming errors (AttributeError, TypeError) are not silently swallowed. The buffer is cleared only on a successful send; on failure a warning is logged and the buffer is retained for the next flush attempt.
